articles.title: Ayatollah Khamenei's iron grip on power in Iran comes to an end
articles.summary: Iranian state TV confirms the supreme leader has been killed on the first day of massive US and Israeli air strikes on the country.

articles.title: What we know so far: Supreme Leader Khamenei killed, as Iran launches retaliatory strikes
articles.summary: Iran responds by launching missiles and drones towards Israel and four Gulf Arab countries that host US military bases.

articles.title: Iran says US and Israel strikes hit school killing 108
articles.summary: There is no confirmation by the US or Israel of the strike on the school located near elite military troops.

articles.title: Wellness peptide craze: Why people are injecting drugs 'not for human consumption'

articles.title: Why is WhatsApp's privacy policy facing a legal challenge in India?

articles.title: Bill Clinton asked about hot tub photo and testifies he knew 'nothing' of Epstein crimes
